title: ROG Ally Modpack
description: A simple modpack that improves overall performance and enables controller support for the Asus ROG Ally. Also adds now extra content.
body:
# 🎮 Asus ROG Ally Modpack
## Optimized for Maximum Performance on Handheld Devices

### New!
Now i release versions that can run on the silent mode to ensure to get most out of the Battery. This kind of versions are marked with Low:

**ROG-Ally 1.21.8 Fabric Low**

**Version is something like Low-1.0.1**

---

This modpack was specifically designed for use on the **Asus ROG Ally** and thoroughly tested on the device.  
It combines **enhanced performance** with **optimized controls** for a smooth, controller-friendly gaming experience —  **no mouse or keyboard needed**.

---
### If you are a mod developer and do not want your mod to be included in my modpack, please contact me and I will remove it as soon as possible. You can find my contact details in my [Profile](https://modrinth.com/user/Varamos)

---

**FPS** should be around **150-350** depence on what Powermode is used and if there are any other apps running.

---
## Setup:

1. Activate **Gamepad Mode**
2. Choose atleast the **15w Powermode (Recommended)**
3. Start the Game
4. Let the game configure and download the controls
5. ~~**Restart your Game**~~ **Sometimes needed**
   
**If the controls won't work go to options, then controls and after that choose controller settings and click use**
---
## ✨ Highlights

### 🚀 Optimized Performance  
All included mods are carefully selected and configured to make the most of the ROG Ally’s hardware, ensuring smooth gameplay.

### 🎮 Controller Support  
Full gamepad support makes this modpack perfect for gaming on the go or from the couch.
![Controlify Keyboard](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46a0fb1d756866c297128d6920be2e2d0cc947fd.png)
### ⚡ Faster World Loading  
Use the `/chunky start` command to preload up to **500 chunks**, reducing in-game lag and improving load times.

### Comes with Shader Support
You can install and use any shader. I tested the BSL Shader on High while using the **10w Power** mode and you get about **30-50 FPS!!!**

---

## 📝 Notes

- Before you start switch to **Gamepad Mode** on your ROG Ally.
- All mods and settings were tested on the **Asus ROG Ally Z1E** to ensure **stable and high-performance gameplay**.
- I used the CPU Boost consider it as an go to if you still have low framerate **(keep in mind this is using more of the battery charge).**
- If you want to play on the go without charging, I would recommend disabling the **Async** mod.

**Not affiliated with ASUS**
